headline: Samsung Still Leads — But Foldable Rivals Are Closing In Fast
summary: North America's foldable market grew 28% in 2025. See how Motorola and Google are challenging Samsung's lead as Apple prepares to enter.

headline: Truist Cautious on Corning (GLW) Despite Strong AI and Cloud Spending Tailwinds
summary: Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) is included among the 13 Best Diversified Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 31, Truist initiated coverage of Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) with a Hold rating. It set a $125 price target on the stock. The firm said networking and hardware companies are closely tied to rising AI and cloud spending. […]
